response.global_analysis: Transcription and translation of Cecilia Immergreen's 3D debut segment. The first half features dialogue regarding merch reveals and a staged 'car fire', while the second half is a performance of 'Intergalactic Bound'. The audio phonetically matches the provided song lyrics; timing is strictly synchronized to the vocal waveform. On-screen text for song credits and merch items has been incorporated for clarity.

subtitles.original: （笑い声）
subtitles.english: (Laughs)

subtitles.original: 私の車が！
subtitles.english: My car!

subtitles.original: うそ！　そんな！
subtitles.english: No! No!

subtitles.original: 二人でいろんなことを乗り越えてきたのに
subtitles.english: We've gone through so much together.

subtitles.original: どうしてこんなことに……
subtitles.english: How could this happen...

subtitles.original: 待って！　水鉄砲だ！
subtitles.english: Wait! A water gun!

subtitles.original: 助けてあげるから！　助けてあげる！
subtitles.english: I can save you! I can save you!

subtitles.original: 嫌だ、こんな終わり方させない！
subtitles.english: No, no, I won't let it end like this!

subtitles.original: あ、意外と簡単だった。
subtitles.english: Oh, well that was easy.

subtitles.original: あ、待って。　待って、何か見える。
subtitles.english: Oh, wait. Wait, I see something.

subtitles.original: あ！　みんな、見て！
subtitles.english: Oh! Look, guys!

subtitles.original: 私の……私のグッズだ！
subtitles.english: It's... it's my merch!

subtitles.original: これが私の3D記念グッズ！
subtitles.english: This is my 3D merch!

subtitles.original: オートモポーチと……えっと……オートモ靴下です。
subtitles.english: It's an Otomo pouch and... um... Otomo socks.

subtitles.original: それで、ポーチの中に靴下を入れられるんだよ。
subtitles.english: And then you put the socks into the pouch...

subtitles.original: 7つ買えば毎日違う靴下が履けるし、
subtitles.english:
And then you buy seven of these so you have socks
for every day of the week.

subtitles.original: これも7つゲットすれば、一石二鳥だね！
subtitles.english:
And then you get seven of these too because
it's one... two in one!

subtitles.original: 靴下が2つだから、一石三鳥かな？
subtitles.english:
Technically I guess three in one because it's two
socks...

subtitles.original: そう！　だからぜひチェックしてね！
subtitles.english: Oh yeah! So please look out for these!

subtitles.original: このコラボの後に発売される予定です。　やったー！
subtitles.english:
They're gonna be releasing after the... um...
just collab. Yeah yeah yeah!

subtitles.original: それから、これも……これも持ってるよ！
subtitles.english: And then I also have... um... I also have this!

subtitles.original: 私の1周年記念グッズ！
subtitles.english: My anniversary merch!

subtitles.original: あと3日間だけ買えるから、ぜひゲットしてね！
subtitles.english:
It's available for three more days,
so please go get it!

subtitles.original: すごく可愛いよ。　こっちは親切なオートモで……
subtitles.english: It's very cute. Here's a very helpful Otomo...

subtitles.original: こっちは完全な悪、悪、悪のオートモです。
subtitles.english: And here's a completely evil, evil, evil Otomo.

subtitles.original: 興味があったらぜひ買ってね。
subtitles.english:
So yeah, please, please get them if
you're interested.

subtitles.original: 概要欄にあると思うけど、どうかな？
subtitles.english:
Please check them out. I think... um...
maybe in the description, I'm not sure.

subtitles.original: さて！　せっかくこの素晴らしいステージにいるんだし、
subtitles.english:
Okay! So obviously, now that we're here on
this beautiful stage...

subtitles.original: 歌を歌わないとね、そうでしょ？
subtitles.english: We're gonna have to sing a song, shall we?

subtitles.original: でも！　歌の後に、もう一つ重大発表があります！
subtitles.english:
But! After the song, there's one more HUGE
announcement!

subtitles.original: だから、歌の後まで待っててね。　すごく楽しみ！
subtitles.english:
So please, uh, wait for after the song as well.
Yeah, I'm very excited!

subtitles.original: よし！　私のオートモ軍団、準備はいい？
subtitles.english: Okay! My army of Otomos, are you ready?

subtitles.original: 次の曲、いくよ？
subtitles.english: Are you ready for the next song?

subtitles.original: よし！　レッツゴー！
subtitles.english: Okay! Let's go!

subtitles.original: 私の3Dに来てくれて本当にありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much for coming to my 3D, everyone!

subtitles.original: ありがとう、スター！　マネちゃん！　オートモ！
subtitles.english:
Thank you, Star! Thank you, Money-chan!
Thank you, Otomo!
